briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their purported AI shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the bankruptcy of fintech middleware company Synapse, highlighting risks in the BaaS model.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple has acquired UK-based open banking startup Credit Kudos, signalling growing Big Tech interest in financial data and credit decisioning.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — An in-depth analysis explores how open banking frameworks are reshaping payments competition and the broader financial services landscape.

- **[US soldier involved in Maduro capture accused of profiting from knowledge of raid on Polymarket](https://www.cbc.ca/news/world/us-soldier-charged-polymarket-maduro-bets-9.7175491)** — *CBC Business* — A US soldier has been charged with trading on classified information via decentralized prediction market Polymarket to profit from the arrest of Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Global payroll platform Borderless AI now lets employees get paid in crypto](https://betakit.com/global-payroll-platform-borderless-ai-now-lets-employees-get-paid-in-crypto/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian global payroll platform Borderless AI has launched a crypto payment option, allowing employees worldwide to receive their wages in cryptocurrency.

- **[BDC's new $500-million loan program will help smaller businesses adopt AI](https://betakit.com/bdcs-new-500-million-loan-program-will-help-smaller-businesses-adopt-ai/)** — *BetaKit* — The Business Development Bank of Canada is launching a $500-million loan program specifically designed to help small and medium-sized businesses finance AI adoption.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada flagged screen scraping as a security risk and set an open banking implementation target, a regulatory trajectory still shaping the country's fintech landscape today.

- **[Cohere to acquire Germany's Aleph Alpha in sovereign AI play](https://betakit.com/cohere-to-acquire-germanys-aleph-alpha-in-sovereign-ai-play/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian AI company Cohere is acquiring Germany's Aleph Alpha in a strategic move to expand its presence in sovereign AI markets across Europe.

- **[Ticketmaster delists Ontario resale tickets after new law caps prices](https://www.cbc.ca/news/canada/toronto/ticketmaster-delist-resale-tickets-ontario-9.7175775)** — *CBC Business* — Ticketmaster has removed Ontario resale listings in response to new provincial legislation capping ticket resale prices, raising questions about platform compliance and payments ecosystems in regulated markets.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is transforming traditional credit card products with new reward structures, embedded finance features, and niche offerings — trends directly relevant to Atlantic Canadian credit unions and payments innovators looking to compete.

- **[OpenTable gobbles up Canadian market share with Libro acquisition](https://betakit.com/opentable-gobbles-up-canadian-market-share-with-libro-acquisition/)** — *BetaKit* — OpenTable's acquisition of Canadian restaurant platform Libro illustrates how embedded payments and platform consolidation are reshaping commerce tech, a dynamic Atlantic Canadian fintech startups should watch closely.
